authority: local TaxKit documentation and decision-record changes with read-only repository inspection only
acceptedOutcome: Five evidence-backed decision records accept strict lifecycle routing, public draft/published semantics, transient local tarball handling, sanitized release-receipt retention, and publication/deployment non-claims.

decisions.outcome: Use strict lifecycle routing and retain existing paths; physical movement or deletion requires a separately approved retention manifest.
draft is authored, locally renderable, visibly labelled candidate content; published is explicitly accepted current documentation. Neither proves external availability.
Local repository evidence cannot grant external authority or prove publication, deployment, registry, production, or public availability.
Local packed tarballs are transient check inputs, deleted by their owning command; only sanitized commit/package/digest/check receipts may remain.
Future durable proof is sanitized JSON under docs/evidence/releases/**; raw logs and secrets are prohibited and provider CI logs are transient.

verification.check: canonical decision-record schema and task-map equality
verification.result: All five records validate against decision-record.schema.json; affectedTasks exactly equals the taskBlocking task IDs in every record.

verification.check: source provenance and public lifecycle inventory
verification.result: Every source digest reproduces from the current local candidate; all 61 tracked public MDX files and navigation carry draft metadata, while the receipt makes no publication or availability claim.

After two control-correction rounds, a new independent reviewer reproduced all five accepted decisions, the strict page-acceptance boundary, source/digest chain, transient tarball and sanitized receipt policies, and every external-state nonclaim.
The docs-content validator reported zero issues after the evaluator-driven metadata correction.
Repository path/type accounting, Effect language-service, lint, format, 12 skill-policy tests, Knip, production Knip, and all 23 workspace typecheck/build tasks passed.

limitations: These local decisions do not establish public-site availability, registry publication, deployment, SSR, hydration, production, or external-consumer behavior.
These local decisions do not create page-level acceptance, durable release receipts, runbooks, provider evidence, or external availability proof.
nonClaims: No public content, release artifact, evidence, provider, registry, publication, deployment, or external system was mutated.
No release artifact, raw log, secret, provider CI log, or external system was retained or mutated.
rollback: Revert this bounded HGI-207 decision-record slice; preserve HGI-200, HGI-201, historical evidence, public content, and the prior decision provenance.
nextTrigger: Proceed with HGI-202 local completion and then HGI-208; page transitions, release receipts, runbooks, and external operations remain separately scoped.
